evals.prompt: In xd-drawing-system, setup exists and a feature note exists, but the seven core docs are missing. What should happen next?
evals.expected_output: Identifies Stage 1 Feature docs, recommends feature-docs-scaffold, blocks implementation, and reports hook automation as none unless evidence exists.
